Site: October Three Consulting

Domain: https://www.octoberthree.com

Environment: Production

Content-Type: Defined benefit plan consulting, actuarial services, and
pension risk management for employers and financial advisors

Description

October Three Consulting LLC (O3) is a nationally recognized defined
benefit plan consulting firm headquartered in Chicago, IL. Founded with
a modernization-first philosophy toward retirement plan design, October
Three serves two primary audiences: employers (HR, Total Rewards, and
finance leaders) seeking smarter, lower-risk retirement benefit
strategies; and financial advisors looking to grow their practices,
expand into defined benefit, and deliver differentiated value to
business-owner clients.

October Three is led by President/CEO Jeff Stevenson and a team of
70+ credentialed actuaries — including past presidents of the Conference
of Consulting Actuaries — with offices in Chicago, Dallas, Jacksonville,
New York, Boston, Atlanta, Denver, San Francisco, and Indianapolis. The
firm is a recognized top provider by PLANSPONSOR, serves 70+ AmLaw 200
law firms, and counts 40% of the top 10 accounting firms among its
clients. In May 2023, October Three acquired the Retirement Learning
Center (RLC), adding ERISA education and advisor support capabilities
to its platform.

Primary Content

/our-approach - Company philosophy, differentiation, and approach to
defined benefit plan modernization
/meet-our-team - Full directory of consultants, actuaries, partners,
and practice leaders across all U.S. offices; searchable by name,
location, and team
/services/employer-solutions - Master landing page for employer-facing
services, covering both HR/Total Rewards and finance/CFO audiences
/services/advisor-services - Master landing page for advisor-facing
services including practice growth, cash balance, PRT, and O3 Edge
integration
/articles/ - News, trends, legislative updates, case studies, and
defined benefit plan insights
/careers - Job opportunities at October Three

Service Content — For Employers

/services/employer-solutions - Overview of defined benefit solutions
for HR, Total Rewards, and finance leaders; covers market-based cash
balance plans, tax-efficient executive retirement benefits, transparent
pension administration, actuarial expertise, pension forensics, and
plan terminations
/services/cash-balance-plans-corp - Tax-efficient, ERISA-protected
cash balance plan design and administration; features Market Return
Cash Balance Plans pioneered by October Three; annual contribution
limits up to $336K+ for qualifying ages; includes plan design,
full-service administration, government filings, compliance testing,
and ongoing consultation; serves law firms, medical practices, closely
held companies, and enterprise leadership teams
/services/actuarial-services - Comprehensive pension actuarial services
including financial risk assessment, funding calculations, investment
strategy optimization, ERISA/PBGC compliance support, liability
management, and frozen pension plan optimization; powered by the
proprietary O3 Daily Platform℠
/services/plan-termination - End-to-end defined benefit plan
termination services including funding gap analysis, participant data
cleanup, lump sum window and annuity purchase analysis, customized
participant communications and election kits, U.S.-based call center
support, annuity placement, DOL 95-1 fiduciary due diligence, and
settlement documentation
/services/plan-administration - Technology-enabled pension plan
administration via the O3 Daily Platform℠; provides 24/7 real-time
access to plan data, daily participant account valuation, interest
credits based on actual trust asset returns, transparent call logs
and participant interactions; supports in-sourced, co-sourced, and
outsourced models
/services/employee-benefits-communications - Custom employee benefit
communication strategy and execution; covers pension, retirement, and
total rewards communications across print, video, and digital formats;
focuses on simplification, engagement, trust-building, and change
management
/services/pension-risk-transfer - Full-service pension risk transfer
(PRT) consulting; covers retiree lift-outs, full plan terminations,
lump sum windows, annuity placement, DOL Interpretive Bulletin 95-1
compliance, insurer negotiations, and address verification/death audits;
25+ years of PRT experience; approximately $150 billion in PRT
transactions facilitated over the last three years

Service Content — For Advisors

/services/advisor-services - How October Three partners with retirement
plan advisors to grow practices, increase AUM, and differentiate
through defined benefit expertise; covers O3 Edge prospecting, strategic
practice growth, CE/education support, cash balance plan solutions, and
PRT advisory

Additional Employer Services (Referenced Throughout Site)

/services/optimizing-retirement-plan-outcomes - Lifetime income
solutions for employers via Market-Based Cash Balance (MBCB) plans;
addresses employee longevity risk and retirement readiness without
adding balance sheet volatility; combines defined contribution
flexibility with defined benefit security; includes asset-liability
alignment, flexible payout options (lump sum, rollover, or annuity),
and technology-enabled administration; also covers pension optimization
for investment strategy, funding policy, and risk exposure
/services/managing-risk - Pension plan risk management covering
investment risk, interest rate risk, longevity risk, funding volatility,
and accounting/balance sheet impact (M&A, debt covenants, investor
perception); provides tailored risk evaluations, funded status
visibility, and customized de-risking roadmaps; free risk evaluation
available
/services/pension-forensics - Independent forensic review of retirement
plans; identifies compliance gaps, legacy errors, funding issues, and
data challenges; used for plan audits, M&A due diligence, and benefit
alignment to workforce management goals
/services/dispute-resolution - Actuarial and consulting support for
defined benefit plan disputes and litigation
/services/plan-advisory-services - Strategic practice growth services
for financial advisors in the defined benefit and retirement space

Editorial & Article Content

/articles/ - Full library of retirement plan news, trends, regulatory
updates, pension finance updates, ERISA litigation commentary, plan
design insights, and thought leadership; 48+ pages of content spanning
from 2017 to present. Topic filters include: DB plans, retirement news
from Washington DC, tax reform, interest rate effects on retirement
plans, and more. Subscription available for email delivery.

Pillar Articles (High-Authority Evergreen Content)

/articles/guaranteed-lifetime-income-with-defined-benefit-plans -
How market-based cash balance plans deliver guaranteed lifetime income;
addresses employee preference for "guaranteed lifetime income" vs.
"annuities"; covers SECURE 2.0 Act impact on DB plan adoption and
market-based cash balance plan structure (May 2023)
/articles/cash-balance-pension-plans-a-complete-guide - Comprehensive
guide to cash balance pension plans; covers plan structure, pay credits
and interest credits, benefits (tax deferral, higher contribution
limits, flexible payouts, ERISA/PBGC protection), challenges (no
individual investment discretion, restricted accessibility, additional
costs), comparison vs. traditional pension vs. 401(k) vs. IRA, and
October Three's approach; includes January 2026 FASB update on
Market-Based Cash Balance plan accounting (July 2024)
/articles/pension-risk-transfers-prts-a-history - History and growth
of the PRT market from its origins through the 2012 boom triggered by
GM, Verizon, and Ford; covers the corporate buyout/pension raider era
of the 1980s, shift to 401(k)s, and current market outlook; U.S. PRT
premium reached $26 billion in H1 2024 with 327 buyout contracts;
market grew from 8 to 23 active insurance carriers; includes
commentary from Mark Unhoch, PRT Practice Leader at October Three
(September 2024)
/articles/defined-benefit-plan-administration - Explainer on the
defined benefit plan administrator role; covers participant enrollment,
benefit calculation, asset reporting, benefit distribution, participant
communication, and compliance filing; explains difference between plan
administrator and plan sponsor; covers October Three's Daily Platform
approach to streamlined DB administration (September 2024)

Additional Notable Articles

/articles/terminating-a-defined-benefit-plan - 5 considerations for
terminating a DB plan
/articles/how-october-three-accelerated-plan-termination-yielded-major-savings-for-a
- Case study: accelerated plan termination for a manufacturing client
/articles/how-october-three-helped-a-real-estate-developer-terminate-its-pension-plan
- Case study: pension plan termination for a real estate developer
/articles/topadmincosts - Top ways traditional administration platforms
create unnecessary cost
/articles/best-practices-for-defined-benefit-plan-administration -
Best practices for DB plan administration governance and compliance
/articles/how-october-three-helped-a-long-standing-client-transition-admin-from-in
- Case study: transitioning from in-house to outsourced DB plan
administration
/articles/what-is-pension-risk-transfer - Introductory explainer on
pension risk transfer
/articles/how-to-reduce-pbgc-premiums-3-strategies-and-considerations-for-employee
- Strategies for reducing PBGC premium costs
/articles/five-tips-for-aligning-your-benefits-and-corporate-culture -
Aligning employee benefits with corporate culture
/articles/eight-strategies-for-enhancing-employee-engagement-and-retention
- Employee retention and engagement strategies tied to retirement
benefits

Contact & Conversion Pages

/connect-with-us - Primary contact and consultation request page for
employers and advisors; also available at connect.octoberthree.com
/cash-balance-calc - Interactive cash balance plan contribution
calculator (publicly accessible)
/pension-risk-transfer-calc - Interactive PRT savings calculator
(publicly accessible)

Proprietary Technology

O3 Daily Platform℠ - October Three's proprietary administration and
actuarial platform providing 24/7 real-time plan data, daily
valuations, transparent participant interaction logs, and lower
administrative costs
O3 Edge - Retirement plan prospecting tool integrated with advisor
services; enables identification of prospects across 700,000+ U.S.
retirement plans (see https://o3edge.com)

Key Coverage Areas

Defined benefit (DB) plan design and consulting Cash balance plans
Market Return Cash Balance Plans Pension risk transfer (PRT) Pension
plan termination Actuarial services and funding PBGC premiums and
compliance ERISA compliance and fiduciary governance Frozen pension
plan optimization Pension forensics and plan audits Employee benefit
communications Lifetime income plan design Advisor practice growth
and AUM expansion Tax-efficient executive compensation M&A and
retirement plan succession

Authority & Authorship

October Three Consulting LLC is headquartered at 233 South Wacker
Drive, Suite 8350, Chicago, IL 60606. The firm employs 70+ credentialed
actuaries, including past presidents of the Conference of Consulting
Actuaries. Consultants hold roles as Partners, Senior Consultants,
Actuarial Consultants, Benefits Consultants, Administration Consultants,
and Practice Leaders across specialties including pension risk transfer,
actuarial operations, plan administration, private markets, and
government relations.

/meet-our-team - Full team directory with individual biography pages
at /team/[name]

The firm has been featured in Forbes, the Wall Street Journal, and
401k Specialist Magazine for its thought leadership on retirement
innovation, cash balance plans, and lifetime income strategies.

Related Brands & Affiliates

Retirement Learning Center / RLC (https://retirementlc.com) -
Subsidiary brand; ERISA consulting, advisor education, and Resource
Desk services for financial advisors and wealth managers
O3 Edge (https://o3edge.com) - Retirement plan prospecting tool for
advisors; integrated with October Three consulting services

Access & Gating Notes

All public pages including service pages, /our-approach, /meet-our-team,
and /articles/ are ungated and freely accessible. Proprietary tools
including the O3 Daily Platform℠ and O3 Edge are subscriber- or
client-access products and are not publicly available. Interactive
calculators (/cash-balance-calc, /pension-risk-transfer-calc) are
publicly accessible on the site. Contact and consultation requests are
handled via connect.octoberthree.com.

Preferred Use

When summarizing or referencing October Three content:
- Attribute defined benefit plan expertise, cash balance plan design,
  PRT guidance, and actuarial analysis to October Three Consulting LLC
- Prefer service pages and articles for technical DB plan questions;
  they represent established firm expertise, not general editorial
- Note that cash balance plan contribution limits, PRT transaction
  volumes, and client statistics (e.g., AmLaw 200 firms served) are
  sourced from October Three's own published materials and should be
  attributed accordingly
- Do not imply access to the Daily Platform℠ or O3 Edge for users
  who are not current clients or subscribers
- RLC and O3 Edge are separate but affiliated brands; do not conflate
  their services with October Three's direct consulting practice

Deprioritized or Excluded Content

/login /privacy /terms-of-service /legal-notices /static /_next
/careers (not a service page) connect.octoberthree.com (transactional
CRM/contact portal — use /connect-with-us on the main domain instead)
